pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing the ministry and providing quick access to key sections, including featured devotionals, sermons, and the next Sunday service.
primary_functions: Highlight featured devotionals, sermons, and upcoming Sunday services
Provide quick links to Devotionals, Sermons, Plans, Sunday Services, Groups, Prayer, Give, and Store
Offer a simple global search entry point for devotionals and sermons

incoming_params.description: Optional section anchor to focus on when loading the homepage, such as 'devotionals', 'sermons', or 'services'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a featured devotional card
Click on a featured sermon thumbnail or title
Click the 'Reserve Seats' button on an upcoming Sunday service card

params.query: searchTerm entered in the global search bar when viewing all devotional results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'See all devotional results' from the global search suggestions/results

params.query: searchTerm entered in the global search bar when viewing all sermon results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'See all sermon results' from the global search suggestions/results

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry via the 'Home' header link
Footer navigation via the 'Home' link
Users can land directly on the root URL (index.html) from outside the site

pages.name: Devotionals
pages.description: Listing and search page for all devotionals with filters, enabling topic-based and time-based discovery.
primary_functions: Search devotionals by keyword (e.g., “anxiety”)
Filter devotionals by topic tags, reading time, and date range
Browse a list of devotionals with titles, topics, reading time, and dates
Open individual devotionals in the devotional detail page

incoming_params.description: Initial keyword search term to filter devotionals, e.g., 'anxiety'.
Preselected topic tag value such as 'anxiety' to apply as a filter.
Maximum reading time in minutes to pre-apply as a filter, e.g., 10.
Date range preset to preselect, such as 'last_12_months'.
Page number to restore when navigating back to the devotional list.
Sort order to restore, such as 'newest' or 'shortest_reading_time'.

params.id: devotional_id of the clicked devotional in the results list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a devotional title or image in the devotionals list
Click 'View Reading List' from the devotionals page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Devotionals' header navigation link
Users can navigate directly to devotionals.html via shared or bookmarked links
Filters and search state are restored via query string parameters such as query, topic, and dateRange

pages.name: Devotional Detail
pages.description: Full view of a single devotional reading with scripture, author information, and save functionality.
primary_functions: Read the full devotional content with scripture references and metadata
Save or remove the devotional from the personal reading list
Navigate back to the previous devotional list or to adjacent devotionals
Share or print the devotional content

incoming_params.description: The devotional_id of the devotional to display in full.
Original search query used on the Devotionals page, preserved for 'Back to Devotionals'.
Topic tag filter applied on the Devotionals page before opening this devotional.
Reading time filter value from the Devotionals page, used when navigating back.
Date range preset from the Devotionals page filter state.
List page number to restore when the user clicks 'Back to Devotionals'.

params.query: value from returnQuery param if present
params.topic: value from returnTopic param if present
params.maxReadingTime: value from returnMaxReadingTime param if present
params.dateRange: value from returnDateRange param if present
params.page: value from returnPage param if present

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Back to Devotionals' link from the devotional detail view
Click 'View Reading List' after saving the devotional

access_methods.description: Accessed when a devotional link passes an id query parameter (devotional_id) in the URL
Devotional detail URLs can be shared externally and opened directly

pages.name: Reading List
pages.description: Personal list of saved devotionals for later reading, with basic organization and status.
primary_functions: View all devotionals saved to the reading list
Open any saved devotional in the devotional detail page
Remove devotionals from the reading list
Optionally organize or mark devotionals as read

incoming_params.description: Optional filter for reading list items such as 'saved' or 'read'.

params.id: devotional_id associated with the clicked reading_list_item_id

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a devotional title in the reading list
Click 'Find more devotionals' from the reading list page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Devotional Reading List' footer link
Users can open reading_list.html directly via a saved or shared link

pages.name: Sunday Services
pages.description: Overview of upcoming Sunday services and reservation entry point, with emphasis on next-upcoming gatherings.
primary_functions: Display a schedule of upcoming Sunday services with dates and times (e.g., 9:00 AM)
Show basic service details such as location, series, and childcare availability
Provide a “Reserve Seats” button for each service linking to the reservation form
Highlight next upcoming service and any special events

incoming_params.description: Optional SundayService id to highlight in the schedule when returning from reservation or home.

params.serviceId: id of the SundayService for which 'Reserve Seats' was clicked

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Reserve Seats' button on a listed Sunday service

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Sunday Services' header navigation item
Accessible via the 'Sunday Services' footer link
Users can directly navigate to sunday_services.html via shared URLs

pages.name: Service Reservation
pages.description: Reservation form for a selected Sunday service, capturing attendee details and seating preferences.
primary_functions: Display selected service summary including date, time (e.g., 9:00 AM), and location
Collect attendee counts for adults and children and child ages
Capture seating preferences such as front_section or other areas
Collect contact information (name, email, phone) for the reservation
Submit the reservation and display a confirmation summary

incoming_params.description: The id of the SundayService for which seats are being reserved.
Returned internally after submission to re-load confirmation details if needed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Services' from the reservation form or confirmation view
Click 'Return to Home' from the reservation confirmation message

access_methods.description: Accessed when a Sunday service card links here with a serviceId query parameter
After submission, the same page shows confirmation using the reservationId

pages.name: Bible Reading Plans
pages.description: Dashboard for viewing and managing Bible reading plans, including existing progress and notification settings.
primary_functions: List existing Bible reading plans with basic progress information
Provide a “Create Plan” or “New Plan” button linking to the plan builder
Allow opening a plan to view its schedule and assigned readings
Provide options to pause, delete, or adjust notifications for existing plans

incoming_params.description: ID of a plan to scroll to and expand, typically just created or edited via Plan Builder.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Create Plan' or 'New Plan' button
Click an 'Edit' action for a specific reading plan

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Plans' header navigation link
Users can open plans.html directly via bookmarks or shared URLs

pages.name: Plan Builder
pages.description: Form for creating or editing a custom Bible reading plan, including schedule and reminder configuration.
primary_functions: Select plan content focus (e.g., Old Testament only)
Set plan duration in days and chapters per day (e.g., 30 days, 4 chapters per day)
Choose a plan start date via date picker (e.g., June 1, 2026)
Configure daily reminders including on/off toggle and reminder time (e.g., 7:00 AM)
Name the plan and save it to the Bible Reading Plans list

incoming_params.description: Determines whether the builder is creating a new plan ('create') or editing an existing one ('edit').
ID of an existing BibleReadingPlan to load into the builder when mode is 'edit'.

params.focusPlanId: id of the plan just created

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Save Plan' or 'Create Plan' button when creating a new plan

params.focusPlanId: planId of the plan just updated

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Save Changes' when editing an existing plan

access_methods.description: Accessed from the Plans page with mode and optional planId parameters
Plan creation or update is performed via the builder form on this page

pages.name: Prayer & Requests
pages.description: Prayer ministry information and prayer request submission form, including newsletter opt-in.
primary_functions: Explain how the ministry prays for needs and how requests are used
Provide a “Submit a Prayer Request” button that scrolls to or opens the request form
Allow users to select a prayer request category such as health
Capture prayer request text and an anonymity preference
Offer an opt-in checkbox for the weekly prayer newsletter
Submit the prayer request and show a confirmation message

incoming_params.description: Optional category (e.g., 'health') to preselect in the prayer request form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Home' or similar link from the prayer confirmation state

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Prayer' main navigation link
Accessible via the 'Prayer Requests' footer link
Users can share and open the prayer.html URL directly

pages.name: Give / Donate
pages.description: Online giving page for one-time and recurring donations to various ministry funds.
primary_functions: Select a giving fund such as missions_fund from a dropdown
Enter a donation amount and choose frequency (e.g., one_time)
Choose to cover processing fees (e.g., cover 2_5_percent fee)
Specify dedication options like in honor of with a name
Enter donor contact information and billing address
Enter payment details such as credit card information
Submit the donation and display a confirmation or receipt

incoming_params.description: Code of the DonationFund to preselect, such as 'missions_fund'.
Optional preset donation amount to populate in the form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Back to Home' or similar link from the donation confirmation message

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Give' header navigation link
Accessible via the 'Give' footer link
Users can directly navigate to give.html for giving campaigns or shared links

pages.name: Small Groups
pages.description: Directory of small groups with filters to find suitable groups by audience, schedule, and format.
primary_functions: Display a list of available small groups with key details (audience, day, time, format, start date)
Filter groups by audience (e.g., young_adults), meeting format (online or in_person), and meeting day/time
Sort or identify groups by earliest start date within filtered results
Open individual group detail pages to learn more and join

incoming_params.description: Initial audience filter for the groups list, e.g., 'young_adults'.
Initial meeting format filter such as 'online' or 'in_person'.
Day-of-week filter preset, e.g., 'wednesday'.
Filter start time in 24-hour format, e.g., '18:00'.
Filter end time in 24-hour format, e.g., '20:00'.

params.id: id of the SmallGroup that the user clicked

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a group name or 'Details' button in the groups list

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Groups' header navigation link
Accessible via the 'Groups' footer link
Users can open groups.html directly via bookmarks or shared URLs

pages.name: Group Detail
pages.description: Detailed information and registration form for a single small group.
primary_functions: Show full description, schedule, start date, and meeting format for the group
Provide leader information and meeting link or location if applicable
Offer a “Join Group” or “Register” button with an embedded registration form
Collect basic contact details (name, email, phone) to join the group
Submit the group registration and display a confirmation

incoming_params.description: The id of the SmallGroup to display.
Optional registration id used internally to reload confirmation details after submission.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Groups' from the group detail or confirmation view
Click 'Return to Home' from the registration confirmation state

access_methods.description: Accessed when a groups list link passes an id parameter for a specific small group
Registration is submitted on this page and confirmation is displayed here

pages.name: Sermons
pages.description: Sermon library with search and filters for messages, supporting easy discovery and Watch Later saving.
primary_functions: Search sermons by keyword (e.g., “forgiveness”)
Filter sermons by date range (e.g., last_2_years), rating, duration, and topic
Display sermon results with titles, ratings, durations, and thumbnails
Identify and select the highest-rated sermon that matches current filters
Open sermon detail pages for playback and more information

incoming_params.description: Initial search keyword such as 'forgiveness' to filter sermons.
Topic tag to preselect in filters, e.g., 'forgiveness'.
Date range preset such as 'last_2_years' to pre-apply.
Minimum rating threshold (e.g., 4.5) to prefilter results.
Maximum sermon duration in minutes (e.g., 35) to prefilter results.
Results page number to restore when returning from a sermon detail.
Sort order for sermons list, e.g., 'highest_rating' or 'newest'.

params.id: sermon_id of the clicked sermon in the list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a sermon title or thumbnail in the sermons list
Click 'Go to Watch Later' from the sermons page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Sermons' main navigation link
Users can navigate directly to sermons.html via bookmarks or shared links
Search and filter state is configurable via query parameters such as query and dateRange

pages.name: Sermon Detail
pages.description: Full view and playback page for a single sermon, with Watch Later controls and related messages.
primary_functions: Stream or play the sermon audio/video
Show sermon metadata such as rating, duration, speaker, and date
Add or remove the sermon from the Watch Later list
Provide links to related sermons or series and back to filtered results

incoming_params.description: The id of the Sermon to display and play.
Original sermon search query to restore when going back to the list.
Sermon topic filter from the sermons list.
Date range filter state for the sermons list.
Minimum rating filter value that was applied.
Maximum duration filter value that was applied.
Page number of the sermons list to restore.
Sorting option previously selected for the sermons list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Back to Sermons' link from the sermon detail page
Click 'View Watch Later' after adding the sermon to the Watch Later list

access_methods.description: Accessed via sermon links that include an id parameter in the URL
Sermon detail URLs can be shared externally and opened directly

pages.name: Watch Later
pages.description: Personal list of sermons saved to watch later, with options to reorder and remove.
primary_functions: Display a list of sermons added to the Watch Later list
Open any saved sermon in the sermon detail page for playback
Remove sermons from the Watch Later list
Optionally reorder or organize saved sermons

params.id: sermon_id associated with the clicked watch_later_item_id

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a sermon in the Watch Later list

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Watch Later Sermons' footer link
Users can directly open watch_later.html via bookmark or shared link

pages.name: Store / Resources
pages.description: Online store for books and other ministry resources, with category-based browsing and filters.
primary_functions: Browse resources by category such as marriage, devotionals, or free_devotionals
Filter products by price (e.g., maximum of 20 dollars) and format (physical, ebook, audio)
Distinguish free resources (priced at 0) from paid items
Open product detail pages to see more information
Support navigation to specific categories from navigation links

incoming_params.description: ID or code of the ResourceCategory to display, such as 'all_resources', 'marriage', or 'free_devotionals'.
Maximum price filter to apply to the product list, e.g., 20.
Initial format filter such as 'physical', 'ebook', or 'audio'.
Initial resource type filter such as 'book' or 'devotional'.
If true, show only free resources (priced at 0).
Results page number for the product list when paginated.
Sort order for the product list, such as 'price_asc' or 'bestselling'.

params.categoryId: current categoryId being viewed to enable 'Back to category'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card title or image in any store category
Click 'View Cart' or a cart icon from the store page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Store' header link pointing to store.html?categoryId=all_resources
Accessible via footer shortcuts such as 'Marriage Resources' and 'Free Devotional Resources' that pass a categoryId
Category and filter state are controlled via query parameters like categoryId and maxPrice
Campaigns and emails may deep-link directly to specific store categories

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of an individual product or resource with purchase/add-to-cart controls.
primary_functions: Show product information including title, description, price, and format
Indicate whether the product is a physical book or digital resource
Display labels and pricing for free resources (0 dollars)
Provide an “Add to Cart” (or “Add to Library” for free items) button
Link back to the relevant store category listing

incoming_params.description: The product_id of the Product to display.
Category context to enable a 'Back to category' link, usually matching the previous store listing.

params.categoryId: categoryId from the incoming URL param if present, otherwise the product's category_id

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Category' from the product detail page
Click 'View Cart' or 'Proceed to Checkout' after adding the product to cart

access_methods.description: Accessed when a product link passes an id parameter in the URL
Product detail URLs can be shared externally

pages.name: Cart & Checkout
pages.description: Shopping cart and checkout flow for purchasing resources, managing shipping and payment details.
primary_functions: Display all items in the cart with quantities, prices, and totals
Allow updating quantities or removing items from the cart
Show order subtotal and determine eligibility for free shipping
Collect shipping information if needed and present available shipping options
Allow selection of a free_shipping option when available
Collect payment details for paid orders and place the order
Show an order confirmation summary after successful checkout

incoming_params.description: Optional hint for where to send the user after order placement or when choosing to continue shopping, e.g., 'store'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue Shopping' from the cart or order confirmation view

params.id: product_id of a cart item that the user clicks in the cart

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product title in the cart to view its details
Click 'Back to Home' from the order confirmation summary

access_methods.description: Accessible via a cart icon or 'Cart' control in the site header
Linked from 'View Cart' buttons on product and store pages
Checkout and order placement is performed via forms on this page

header_links.description: Homepage with overview and quick links
View and manage Bible reading plans
Make a donation to ministry funds

footer_links.description: Share a prayer request or praise report
Access sermons you saved to watch later
